name: Zephyrus Draconis
lore:
When the Primordial Dragon fell, its soul was shattered into six fragments of avatars that would later be referred to as the Dragon Knights, or the Draconis siblings.

Zephyrus is the third sibling, wielding the elemental power of wind. He views the ground as a mere anchor, a place for those who fear the freedom of the open air. He soars across the sky orbited by his Gale Blades, shards of condensed atmosphere he carved from the heart of a typhoon.

abilities.name: Gale Blades
abilities.details: Zephyrus is orbited by floating gale blades that travel alongside him. Each blade grants him bonus [ms]movement speed[/].[n]Zephyrus starts with 3 gale blades, and he gains an additional blade every 3 levels (maximum 9 gale blades).

abilities.name: Twin Edges
abilities.details: Zephyrus hurls a gale blade in a target direction, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/] and [ms]movement speed[/]) to all enemies hit. Twin Edges can be recasted again to hurl the second blade, dealing the same damage.[n]If both blades hit the same target, the target is marked, causing Zephyrus's next basic attack against them to deal bonus [ad]physical damage[/] based on their [db]missing health[/].

abilities.name: Crippling Cyclone
abilities.details: Zephyrus commands his floating gale blades to orbit him at high velocity.[n]Each blade deals [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/] and [ms]movement speed[/]) and briefly [db]slows[/] the target. The slow effect is stackable.

abilities.name: Above The Cloud
abilities.details: Zephyrus leaps into the sky, becomming untargetable for a brief movement before hovering above the ground. He gains increased [ms]movement speed[/] and the ability to [ms]travel through terrain[/] for a duration.[n]Zephyrus cannot basic attack during Above The Cloud.

abilities.name: Skyfall Execution
abilities.details: Skyfall Execution is only castable while Zephyrus is airborne during Above The Cloud. When casted, Zephyrus prepares a strike in a line in a target direction, then blinks behind the furthest enemy hero within the range and knock the target up.[n]Zephyrus then slashes the target with his gale blades over the duration, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/] and [ms]movement speed[/]).[n]After that, Zephyrus gains bonus [ad]physical piercing[/] when damaging the same target.
